---
title: "SeqArray_k25_D5"
author: "KirstenCarlson"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

This RMarkdown records commands used to evaluate discoSnp_Rad VCF for errors, using workflow outlined in https://marineomics.github.io/RADseq.html#Evaluate_potential_sources_of_error.

For testing, I will be using only one vcf (k = 25, D = 5).

## Install packages

```{r}
install.packages("BiocManager")
BiocManager::install("SeqArray")
```
## Load Packages

```{r}
library(SeqArray)
```


## Convert VCF file to GDS format

First, make sure sampleID's are correct. DiscoSnp_Rad names sampleid G1-Gx in the order of your fof.txt. In the command line:
```{r}
awk '{split($1,a,"/"); sub(".fastq$","",a[length(a)]); print "G"NR"\t"a[length(a)]}' fof.txt > sample_map.txt
bcftools reheader -s sample_map.txt discoRad_k_25_c_3_D_5_P_5_m_5_sorted_clustered.vcf.gz -o discoRad_k_25_c_3_D_5_P_5_m_5_sorted_clustered.vcf.gz
```
*******corrupted vcf file? Error [E::bgzf_read_block] Failed to read BGZF block data at offset 1178239 expected 3951 bytes; hread returned 1836
Error: BCF read error

Then, slim up the sorted, gzipped vcf by running in the command line.
```{r}
bcftools annotate -x INFO,FORMAT,CONTIG discoRad_k_25_c_3_D_5_P_5_m_5_sorted_clustered.vcf.gz -Oz -o discoRad_k_25_D_5.slim.vcf.gz
tabix -p vcf discoRad_k_25_D_5.slim.vcf.gz 
```

Set variables (directory, filename, parameter analysing):

```{r}
scratch.directory = "/scratch/kcarls36/projects/data/alignments/sint_align/discosnp/k25_D5/"
results.directory = "/home/kcarls36/projects/stephanocoenia_FKNMS/results/discosnp/k25_D5/"
parameters = "k25_D5"
filename = "discoRad_k_25_D_5.slim"
filename.gds = paste0(scratch.directory, filename, ".gds")
filename.vcf = paste0(scratch.directory, filename, ".vcf.gz")
```

Then run SeqArray on the slimmed vcf. (I requested 32G and 4:00:00 for R hpc session. Process took about 1hr15min)
```{r}
SeqArray::seqVCF2GDS(vcf.fn = filename.vcf, out.fn = filename.gds, storage.option="ZIP_RA")
```

Read in file:
```{r}
gdsin = SeqArray::seqOpen(filename.gds)
```


Cross check # samples:
```{r}
print(paste0("The number of SAMPLES in data: ", length(c(SeqArray::seqGetData(gdsin, "sample.id")))))
print(paste0("The number of variants in data: ", length(c(SeqArray::seqGetData(gdsin, "variant.id")))))
```

Upload metadata file???
```{r}
metafile = 
```

## Missingness 

```{r}
print("Per variant: ")
summary(m1 <- SeqArray::seqMissing(gdsin, per.variant=TRUE))
print("Per sample: ")
summary(m2 <- SeqArray::seqMissing(gdsin, per.variant=FALSE))
samples <- SeqArray::seqGetData(gdsin, "sample.id")
cbind(samples,m2)[order(-m2),]
# plot histogram
png(filename= paste0(results.directory, parameters, "_missingness_hist.png"), width = 800, height = 600, units = "px")
hist(m2,breaks=50)
dev.off()
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.align="center}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(results.directory, parameters, "_missingness_hist.png"))
```
